pages.text: $(l)Ancient scrolls$() are twenty parchments left by the lost circle civilization. Each compresses raw mana into a dramatic, world-shaping effect.$(br2)Activate at a $(l)Magic Circle Core$() — one-shot, irreversible, costly.

Four schools by purpose:$(br2)$(l)$(#55AA55)Restoration$()  — Vault, Resync, Worldmender, Arsenal$(br)$(l)$(#5555FF)Warding$()      — Aegis, Eclipse, Fog, Return, Legion$(br)$(l)$(#FFAA00)Conquest$()    — Solar, Dragon, Storm, Heaven, Exile, Avatar, Eruption, Oreblood$(br)$(l)$(#AA0000)Forbidden$()  — Black Sun, Hollow Quarry

$(l)Tier-Lock$(): each scroll lists a minimum tier. Below that, the core ruptures.$(br2)$(l)Forbidden Cost$(): Forbidden scrolls leave Wither scars on the caster — a builtin warning that this magic was never meant for mortal hands.
